title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic's GTM team built CLAFTS, an AI email assistant using the Claude API and Claude Code that helps sales representatives draft customer replies in their own voice. The tool was created by a GTM Product Manager with no prior coding experience to reduce administrative burden on sales teams.
